title: 8bit
description: All Minecraft textures in 8 bit style with 3 colors per texture.
body:
# 8Bit Texture Pack

**Retro gaming nostalgia meets Minecraft**

Transform Minecraft into a classic 8-bit game with drastically reduced color palettes. Every texture uses exactly 3 colors plus transparency, creating an authentic retro aesthetic reminiscent of early NES and Game Boy games.

## Features
- 3-color palette per texture 
- Optimized colors via k-means clustering
- Maintains visual clarity while reducing complexity
- Consistent retro aesthetic across all blocks and items
- Performance-friendly
- Works in vanilla Minecraft (no OptiFine needed)

## Style
Inspired by classic 8-bit consoles, this pack reduces the visual noise of modern Minecraft while preserving gameplay readability. Each texture is carefully color-reduced to capture the essence of retro pixel art.

## Technical
- Pack Format: 75 (Minecraft 1.20.11)
- All textures: PNG with alpha transparency
- Color depth: 3 unique colors per texture

**Perfect for:** Retro enthusiasts, minimalist builders, nostalgia seekers, and anyone wanting a simpler Minecraft aesthetic.

Get ready for the 1980s minecraft experience!
